hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && cd backend && uv run ruff format "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx ]] && [[ "$f" == *frontend/* ]] && cd frontend && npx eslint --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
cd backend && uv run pytest tests/ --tb=short -q
